free_text: The determination of the astrophysical S-factor of
the direct 18O(p,g)19F capture by the ANC method
U-120M cyclotron
18O gas (150 mbar) in a gas chamber with an entrance
window covered by a Ti foil (2-um thick, 4-mm diam.)
and an output window covered by a harvar foil
(3-um thick).
The angular dependent effective target thickness was
determined for the given geometry by calculation.
250 um-thick dE detector and
5 mm-thick E detector
No information on the source of uncertainty
target thickness and detector solid angle (6%)
gas pressure measurement                  (1%)
beam charge measurement                   (3%)
Approved by Vaclav Burjan (2019-01-13)
